normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Policy 1.14 - Temporary Structures
scope_summary: Regulates the installation of temporary structures (sea containers, prefabricated/demountable offices, portable toilets, skip bins and the like) for periods of 12 months or less on private property and on land under the care and control of the City of Melville. Sets out when development approval is exempt (short-duration placements, construction-period structures) and the assessment criteria where approval is required, including on local open space reserves. Proposals exceeding 12 months are assessed under LPS6, the R-Codes and Council policy instead.

key_numeric_standards.topic: exempt placement duration on private property
key_numeric_standards.unit: calendar days within a 6 month period
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: temporary structures on private property without development approval
